# Jorge Graells

> Jorge Graells is an AI engineer and full-stack developer from Spain with 8
> years of experience, focused on applied AI for industry and regulated
> software: RAG pipelines, AI agents and LLMs shipped to production. He is the
> tech lead of a C++ vehicle-inspection software deployed across several
> countries, and combines industrial software, cybersecurity (EU Cyber
> Resilience Act) and the modern web stack (Next.js, React, TypeScript).
> His website features a playable 3D résumé: a videogame village where each
> villager tells one chapter of his career.

Contact: dev.graells@gmail.com · GitHub: https://github.com/jorgegraells ·
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jorge-graells-4a2911117/

## Main pages

- [Home (Spanish)](https://jorgegraells.com/es): profile, projects, stack and career of Jorge Graells
- [Home (English)](https://jorgegraells.com/en): same content in English
- [Playable 3D résumé](https://jorgegraells.com/es/world): videogame village where villagers present each project

## Projects

- WorkLeveling (https://workleveling.com · https://workleveling.app): B2B SaaS
  that gamifies work with RPG mechanics (levels, XP, quests) to boost team
  motivation. Founded and built solo with Next.js 15, React 19, Prisma,
  Supabase and Clerk. In pilot.
- Enterprise AI ("IA para empresas"): RAG assistant over ~50 technical manuals
  giving staff precise answers, multi-language (6), with full auth and an admin
  panel. Built with PHP, Gemini API and Stripe. In production.
- EchoGEO: measures brand visibility inside AI answers (ChatGPT, Perplexity,
  Gemini) and returns a score with concrete actions to get cited. Proprietary
  deterministic scoring engine. In development.
- ANTIDOP: Android app that blocks addictive apps and websites in real time
  with a personal full-screen prompt, dopamine score and daily routine. React
  Native + Expo, TypeScript and Kotlin. Radical privacy: zero telemetry. In
  development.
- AI in industry: integration of AI, cybersecurity and EU compliance inside an
  industrial company running in daily production (Entra ID, FortiGate,
  ThreatLocker, C++ Builder).

## Expertise

- Applied AI: LLMs (Gemini, Claude, OpenAI), RAG, context caching, AI agents,
  embeddings, token-cost optimization
- Web and mobile: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node, React Native, Prisma,
  Supabase, PostgreSQL, Stripe, Clerk
- Industrial systems: C++ Builder/VCL, RS-232 serial protocols, vehicle
  inspection equipment
- Cybersecurity and compliance: FortiGate, Microsoft Entra ID, ThreatLocker,
  EU Cyber Resilience Act
